The [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] '''Aquadon CAVa 400''' was an aquatic design which modified the [[Compact Assault Vehicle/Wheeled PX-10|CAVw PX-10]].

==Characteristics==
As a part of the "modification packages" from Hydrospeare, the company's [[Design Team Beta]] took the Combat Assault Vehicle and made it aquatic. This particular package had found [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] acceptance. Like its fore-bearer, the one-trooper Imperial vehicle had a medium [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] turret. However, the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot's]] cabin was gyroscopically stabilized as in the [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]], so that the vehicle could move in any angle as a [[Submarine/Legends|submarine]], using its powerful stern and lateral thrusters, while the pilot was "fixed" towards the "front". It was also detachable as an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] in case of damage. Its popularity derived from the fact that it did not require hard maintenance for a vehicle of its kind.<ref name="AIR" />

==History==
The Empire used this vehicle during the [[Kath subjugation]]s, particularly against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces on the [[Karm Trenches]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
